meanings.definition: the first or highest in an ordering or series
examples: He wanted to be the first

meanings.definition: the first element in a countable series
the time at which something is supposed to begin
examples: she knew from the get-go that he was the man for her

meanings.definition: the fielding position of the player on a baseball team who is stationed at first of the bases in the infield (counting counterclockwise from home plate)
an honours degree of the highest class
the lowest forward gear ratio in the gear box of a motor vehicle; used to start a car moving
preceding all others in time or space or degree
examples: the first house on the right
the first meetings of the new party
the first phase of his training

meanings.definition: indicating the beginning unit in a series

examples: the initiative phase in the negotiations
an initiatory step toward a treaty
his first (or maiden) speech in Congress
the beginning canto of the poem
the foremost figure among marine artists

meanings.definition: highest in pitch or chief among parts or voices or instruments or orchestra sections

examples: first we must consider the garter snake
when Felix first saw a garter snake

meanings.definition: before another in time, space, or importance

examples: he put his best foot foremost
